app.title: UNDP Crisis Response Platform
app.subtitle: Community-powered damage assessment and rapid response
app.poweredBy: Powered by the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP)
app.openSource: Open-source platform for community-powered crisis response

submit.title: Submit Crisis Report
submit.helpText: Share photos and information about damaged infrastructure to help emergency responders prioritize aid and recovery efforts.
submit.otherInfrastructureRequired: Please specify the other infrastructure type
submit.infrastructureNamePlaceholder: e.g., Central Hospital, Main Street Bridge
submit.crisisNatureRequired: Please select at least one crisis type
submit.debrisClearanceRequired: Please indicate if debris clearance is required
submit.aliasBadgeHelp: Provide a name or alias to earn badges and appear on the community leaderboard. Anonymous submissions are welcome and equally valued.
submit.successMessage: Submission successful! Thank you for your report.
submit.locationRequired: Please enable location services or enter coordinates manually
submit.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
submit.locationError: Unable to get location. Please enable location services or enter manually.
submit.submitError: Error submitting report. Please try again.
submit.buildingLocationHelp: Click on a building footprint or click anywhere on the map to select a location. Zoom in to level 15+ to see building footprints.
submit.buildingAlreadyReported: Already reported: {{level}} damage. Click to update.
submit.zoomNotice: Zoom in to level 15+ to see building footprints
submit.duplicateLocationNotice: It looks like this location has already been reported. Your update helps keep information current!

buildingError.zoom_too_low: Zoom in to see building footprints
buildingError.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
buildingError.network_error: Unable to load buildings. Check your connection.
buildingError.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

map.zoomNotice: Zoom in to level 15+ to see building footprints

errors.zoom_too_low: Zoom in to see building footprints
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
errors.network_error: Unable to load buildings. Check your connection.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

detail.title: Submission Details
detail.verifyReportHelp: Confirming this report helps the contributor earn the Verified Witness badge. Anonymous confirmations are welcome.
detail.confirmError: Could not confirm report. Please try again.

export.title: Export Data
export.description: Export crisis submissions for analysis and reporting. Available formats:
export.jsonDesc: Structured data for APIs and applications

verifiedWitness.name: Verified Witness
verifiedWitness.description: Had a report confirmed by another user

rapidResponder.name: Rapid Responder
rapidResponder.description: Submitted a report within 1 hour of a crisis event

modal.title: Report submitted!
modal.greetingNamed: Thank you, {{name}}, for helping your community.
modal.greetingAnonymous: Thank you for helping your community.
modal.noNewBadges: Your contribution has been recorded. Keep reporting to earn badges.
modal.nextBadgeIntro: You're making progress toward the next badge:

community.anonymousNote: Anonymous submissions are welcome and equally valued. Badges are earned by alias, but contributing without one is just as impactful.
community.noContributors: No contributors yet. Be the first to submit a report!
community.howItWorksIntro: Earn badges by contributing community-powered crisis reports. Badges reward unique, valuable contributions — not repeat submissions at the same location.
community.howItWorksFooter: Badges are tracked by alias (your name) so you can earn recognition across reports. Anonymous submissions are always welcome and equally valued.
